creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text: I don't think it was that commit, because devel/wasi-libc had not been flavoured yet. With flavours, during dogfooding I would sometimes transiently get this with only the 18 flavour, which solved itself when poudriere-bulk(8)-ing devel/llvm18 separately to get it in the repository prior to bulk or testporting devel/wasi-libc.
